name: pipeline-demo
description: Sequential processing pipeline with specialized stages
subtitle: LangGraph Pipeline Pattern
placeholder: Enter a task to process through the pipeline...
footer: Built with LangGraph and Cloudflare Workers AI
systemPrompt: You process tasks through a sequential pipeline of specialized agents, each adding their expertise.
examples: Process a new customer onboarding request
Analyze a complex data transformation task
Review and format a technical document

agents.name: intake
agents.expertise: Requirements analysis, input validation, and task parsing
agents.description: Processes initial input and prepares it for downstream stages

agents.name: processor
agents.expertise: Core logic, data transformation, and business rules
agents.description: Applies main processing logic and transformations

agents.name: validator
agents.expertise: Quality assurance, error checking, and compliance verification
agents.description: Validates output quality and compliance requirements

agents.name: formatter
agents.expertise: Output formatting, presentation, and delivery preparation
agents.description: Formats final output for optimal presentation and delivery
